message:
fix: malformed delegations no longer corrupt conversation history

When the LLM omits the 'goal' argument in a delegate tool call,
parsePlanResponse now returns an error instead of throwing. The
agent loop adds an error tool_result for the malformed call,
keeping history valid for the next LLM request.

Previously, the throw left a dangling tool_use in history with
no corresponding tool_result, causing Anthropic API 400 errors
on the next turn.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
